violations.text: Allergen advisory statement is not present on menus or order point. PIC informed. New Violation. Correct By: 04/10/2025
All handwashing sinks are lacking notification signage. State handout provided. Corrected On-Site. New Violation. Correct By: 02/17/2025

Raw animal foods such as eggs were observed stored above ready-to-eat foods such as celery in the walk-in refrigerator. Raw animal foods must be separated from raw ready-to-eat food such as vegetables during storage. Corrected On-Site. New Violation. Correct By: 02/10/2025

Various prepared foods in the walk-in cooler were observed not marked with the date of preparation. Ready-to-eat time/temperature control for safety (TCS) foods prepared in the establishment and held for more than 24 hours must be marked with the date of preparation. New Violation. Correct By: 02/10/2025

The cutting boards are very scratched and scored. Cutting blocks and boards that are subject to scratching and scoring shall be resurfaced if they can no longer be effectively cleaned and sanitized, or discarded if they are not capable of being resurfaced. New Violation. Correct By: 02/24/2025

Chest freezer located in office was observed in poor repair (gaskets in poor repair and insulation of lid exposed). Equipment also observed with an accumulation of ice and black residue. New Violation. Correct By: 04/10/2025

Several areas in the kitchen (including walls, floors and surrounding areas near equipment) have an accumulation of soil residue and food debris. The physical facilities shall be cleaned as often as necessary to keep them clean. New Violation. Correct By: 02/24/2025

Floor tiles in the kitchen area were not in proper adjustment and/or in good repair (observed detached and/or cracked). The physical facilities must be maintained in good repair. New Violation. Correct By: 08/10/2025
